priority_fixes: Increase local specificity with slightly richer option and reaction phrasing.

If natural, add at least one second-order desirability reference using P2(...).
Avoid making all local consequences feel terminal or convergent; preserve continuation pressure.
Do not let every reaction in page_scene_01 collapse into the same narrative consequence tone.
